subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! It is dawn, and the Star hath risen from the horizon, manifest and resplendent, while 'Abdu'l-Bahá abideth beneath its rays [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی صبح است و کوکب مشرق از افق طالع و لائح و عبدالبهاء در ظل شعاع او
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
